steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The text contrasts a demonstrated success (NASA’s 2022 asteroid experiment) with an unproven claim (about primary objects). The blank must signal this opposition between known and unknown outcomes.

steps.title: Match the logical shift
steps.content: B introduces the necessary contrast, showing doubt about applying the experiment’s success to primary objects. C and D continue in the same positive direction, while A adds an irrelevant example. That matches choice B — B is correct.
